title: I Blew 3 Funded Accounts Before Learning This One Thing
description: Most traders lose their funded accounts doing the SAME thing — trading reversals at the wrong time. In 2026, smart money concepts changed everything. Here's the exact shift that made the difference. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups and order block breakdowns. Link in bio → r2ftrading.com
script: 3 funded accounts. Gone. All in 6 months. Same mistake every single time. Chasing price. Entering late. Getting stopped out right before the move. Then the R2F Trading system showed me something. Smart money doesn't chase. It waits. Monday London open. Price sweeps Friday's high. That's the trap. The real move is opposite. Find the order block left behind. Wait for the fair value gap fill. That's the entry. One setup. Proper risk. 4th funded account — still running. Up 18% in 2026. Stop guessing. Start following smart money. Follow R2F Trading. Free system at r2ftrading.com.
